info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Inbound Delivery API

description.content:
Create and manage inbound deliveries in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_INBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV_0002) supports creation of inbound deliveries with reference to sales documents and manages batch-split items for existing deliveries. Inbound deliveries track the receipt of goods in warehouse operations.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
